name: Subaru Co., Ltd.
summary: Subaru Company, Ltd. provides learning and examination instruction services in Japan. It offers elementary school, junior high school, middle school, high school, satellite preparatory school, and individualized instruction courses. The company operates 37 schools in Kagoshima, 15 schools in Miyazaki, 11 schools in Kumamoto, and 4 schools in Fukuoka. Subaru Co., Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Kagoshima, Japan.
